name: CHEASY
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -e; if [ ! -f .env ] && [ -f .env.example ]; then cp .env.example .env; fi; cd backend && python -m pip install --user pipenv && python -m pipenv sync; cd ../frontend && npm install'

postStartCommand.backend: bash -lc 'if ! ss -ltn | grep -q ":3001\b"; then cd backend && nohup python -m pipenv run python app.py >/tmp/cheasy-backend.log 2>&1 & fi'
postStartCommand.frontend: bash -lc 'if ! ss -ltn | grep -q ":3000\b"; then cd frontend && nohup npm start >/tmp/cheasy-frontend.log 2>&1 & fi'
